title: [codereview] schema.json top-level missing $schema property
description: test/vectors/schema.json:5 The envelope schema has additionalProperties:false but all vector files declare "$schema" at root, causing validation failure for ccp_load_balancing.json. Add it to properties. Tagged codereview per task.
close_reason: Fixed in schema.json by adding  to properties and adjusting required (now supports v1/v2 without breaking validation); 3 clean codereview passes achieved with no further P0-P2 issues in schema or test_vectors after all fixes.
